parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { title: ($json.projectType === 'project' ? 'Project Tracker' : 'Cosmetic Formulation Tracker') + ' - ' + $json.email }, sheets: $json.projectType === 'project' ? [{ properties: { title: 'Tasks' } }, { properties: { title: 'Projects' } }] : [{ properties: { title: 'Formulas' } }, { properties: { title: 'Ingredients' } }, { properties: { title: 'FormulaVersions' } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ values: [[ $('Prepare Headers').first().json.authToken, $('Prepare Headers').first().json.email, $('Prepare Headers').first().json.plan, $('Prepare Headers').first().json.spreadsheetId, $('Prepare Headers').first().json.projectType, '0', '100', new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], 'TRUE' ]] }) }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, authToken: $('Prepare Headers').first().json.authToken, spreadsheetId: $('Prepare Headers').first().json.spreadsheetId, email: $('Prepare Headers').first().json.email, plan: $('Prepare Headers').first().json.plan, projectType: $('Prepare Headers').first().json.projectType, message: 'User registered successfully. Use the authToken as X-Auth-Token header.' }) }}
